rawText:
2 English For Today
Al. Now, write down similar information about yourself.
|. My name is
2. years old.
3. Lhave eyes, hair, and 1 am tall.
4. Tam good at and
5. My hobbies are and
6. Tlike to and
7. Treally don't like
B. Read the following passage about Tarun's first day at the new school.
My first day at the new school was interesting. | was going to school with my
father in a rickshaw. We reached school after fifteen minutes. My father said
goodbye and left me at the school gate. I went in and found that everyone had
gone to class. I walked into my classroom and found a seat. After some time a
teacher came and warmly greeted us. I found the students very friendly in my
new class.
B1. Choose the best answer:
The passage is about
a. who took Tarun to school on the first day.
b. how Tarun felt on the first day in school and why he felt so.
c. what happened in the school on the first day.

Read the following passage about Tarun's first day at the new school.
My first day at the new school was interesting. | was going to school with my
father in a rickshaw. We reached school after fifteen minutes. My father said
goodbye and left me at the school gate. I went in and found that everyone had
gone to class. I walked into my classroom and found a seat. After some time a
teacher came and warmly greeted us. I found the students very friendly in my
new class.
B1. Choose the best answer:
The passage is about
who took Tarun to school on the first day.
how Tarun felt on the first day in school and why he felt so.
what happened in the school on the first day.
